name: Dede's Buttermilk Bread
recipeIngredient: 1/4 teaspoon Baking soda (omit if using powdered buttermilk)
2 tablespoons Red Star active dry yeast
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in the bread pan.
2. Select Light Crust setting and start the machine.
3. Prodigy "research" has shown that if using powdered buttermilk, omit the baking soda.
Note: This recipe is from Bread Machine Magic by Linda Rehberg and Lois Conway.
